title: DEAMON´s necessary FABRIC Server Things
description:
This is the Server Side Version.
It gives a Huge Performance Boost and Many Visual and QoL Changes with Loads of Features, Structures,...
body:
This modpack is the server side version of my modpack!
_(Recommended 8Gb RAM ≥ 3 Player)_

It revamps Minecraft almost completely, giving the player much more control and a more immersive experience, making it feel and look like Minecraft came out just a few years ago!

The modpack contains tons of new structures, a few new biomes and updated vanilla biomes. There are also lots of vanilla mob variants and loads of furnishings.
Bosses and new mobs as well as dungeons make you want to explore a new world with lots of adventures!

Check out the NEW UPDATED (1.21.1) [full Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/deamons-necessary-fabric-things)!
Or you can check out the [client-side Version](https://modrinth.com/modpack/deamons-necessary-fabric-client-things)

# Mods not working

- let me know

# Known Bugs

- This isnt a bug but, *DONT UPDATE ANYTHING* _unless it says so_ 

If you found a Bug, need help or just want to chat you can join my Server on Discord! (The server is not completed)
